description:
You are a staff member at an animal shelter using Animal Shelter Manager (ASM3) in a web browser. A stray mixed breed dog has been brought to the shelter. You need to add a new animal intake record with the following details:

- Animal Name: Biscuit
- Species: Dog
- Breed: Mixed Breed
- Sex: Male (intact)
- Color: Brown and White
- Date of Birth: approximately 2 years ago
- Microchip: 985112010345678
- Intake Type: Stray
- Entry Reason: Stray
- Location: Main Shelter
- Description: Medium-sized friendly mixed breed dog, found wandering near Riverside Park. No collar, appears healthy.

The application is already open and logged in. Navigate to add a new animal and fill in the details above, then save the record.

Login credentials if needed: Username: user / Password: letmein
